overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. A character in a green dress walks along rain-slicked sidewalks and crosses a neon-lit street with heavy traffic and reflective wet surfaces. The scene features towering glass buildings, holographic advertisements, and diverse pedestrians in a high-tech urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside busy street

events.description: pedestrian in dark suit walks past ego from behind, moving in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a woman with a red umbrella, maintaining consistent pace

notable_agents.action: woman carrying a red umbrella walking ahead at steady pace

entered.detail: tall building facade with dark reflective glass panels showing rain reflections
futuristic white-lit rectangular street lamp posts lining the sidewalk
multi-lane street with wet reflective surface showing neon light reflections
tall buildings covered with large glowing digital screens displaying anime characters

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous walk along a covered sidewalk next to a reflective glass building. The camera follows the character past illuminated street pillars while futuristic vehicles pass on the wet multi-lane road to the right. Digital advertisement towers glow in the distance against the night sky.

events.description: character stops at crosswalk curb to wait for passing traffic
large yellow truck and other vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk curb waiting for the traffic signal to change, observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: woman with bright red hair and red leggings approaches and stands waiting to cross

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road surface
long green barrier wall with diagonal pattern across the street
massive curved digital screen displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection and stops at the crosswalk curb. The scene opens up to reveal a wide street with a green construction wall across the way and massive digital billboards. A woman with red hair joins the wait at the curb while various vehicles including a yellow truck pass through the intersection.

events.description: walk signal activates with green WALK text on ground, pedestrians begin crossing
character walks across the yellow striped crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide crosswalk with the red-haired woman, navigating between passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in pink jacket and gray pants crossing from the opposite direction

entered.detail: destination sidewalk with concrete pavement and building entrances
tropical palm trees visible across the street near the buildings
futuristic cars including a red convertible parked along the far curb

segments.scene_description: The walk signal changes and the character steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk, crossing the wide wet street alongside the red-haired woman. A man in a distinctive pink jacket crosses from the opposite direction. The camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk where palm trees and parked futuristic vehicles are visible, with the massive digital billboards now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway into the open expanse of a neon-lit city intersection. It begins by trailing the character along a covered sidewalk beside a reflective glass building, moving past illuminated pillars as futuristic vehicles glide along a rain-slicked road. As the character reaches the curb, the perspective opens up to reveal a wide street dominated by massive digital billboards and a green construction wall, where a red-haired woman joins the wait amidst the flow of passing traffic. The scene then shifts as the walk signal changes, leading the camera across the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians, including a man in a pink jacket. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera reaches the opposite sidewalk, passing under palm trees and parked futuristic vehicles with the glowing billboards towering to the right.
